allow: PowerShell($body = '{"email":"testuser@example.com","password":"password123"}'; $response = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri http://localhost:3001/api/auth/signup -Method POST -ContentType "application/json" -Body $body; Write-Output "Signup OK - token: $\($response.token.Substring\(0,20\)\)... user: $\($response.user.email\)")

PowerShell($body = '{"email":"testuser@example.com","password":"password123"}'; $response = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri http://localhost:3001/api/auth/signin -Method POST -ContentType "application/json" -Body $body; $token = $response.token; Write-Output "Signin OK - user: $\($response.user.email\)"; $scoreBody = '{"score":100}'; $scoreResp = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri http://localhost:3001/api/scores -Method POST -ContentType "application/json" -Headers @{Authorization = "Bearer $token"} -Body $scoreBody; Write-Output "Score saved: $\($scoreResp.ok\)"; $history = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri http://localhost:3001/api/scores/me -Method GET -Headers @{Authorization = "Bearer $token"}; Write-Output "Score history count: $\($history.Count\), latest score: $\($history[0].score\)")
